name: Streaming Audio Encoder for Broadcast Engineers | Rocket
snippet: Rocket Broadcaster is a streaming IP audio encoder for broadcasting online. For Windows 7 or later. Broadcast audio as AAC+, MP3, AAC-LC, HE-AAC v1, Ogg Vorbis, Ogg Opus, or lossless Ogg FLAC. Bitrates from 16 to 320 kbps are supported, so you can find the best balance for your station.
